---
title: "The Rev. Henry Latham"
---

## The Rev. Henry Latham

**Dates:** (1794-1866)

### Description

Vicar of Fittleworth, Sussex, stepfather of Margaret Roberts

### Biography

He married first, Maria Halliwell (d. 1846) and, secondly (1848) Charlotte (Warren), widow of the Rev. Ellis Roberts.  

The children of his first marriage included Diana Latham.

[Blain, <i>Feminist Companion</i>, ODNB; George Ormerod, <i>Parentalia</i> (1851)]

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 3d 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
